note: E.1 邏輯逐檔重放 63 個 *.principles.stories.tsx:每檔驗 (a) universal core >=2 of {WhenToUse, WhenNotToUse, Vs*Rule, ContentGuidelines}(UsageGuidance 計 2;UsageScenarioRule/WhatItIs credit WhenToUse;deprecated names credit WhenNotToUse)(b) 無 deprecated naming(Forbidden/Donts/Pitfalls/Prohibitions/NonGoals/VisualDonts)。含 @principles-rationale escape。= 0 違規。
